earn.title: Earn Tickets
earn.subtitle: Complete tasks to earn tickets for the weekly draw

dailyMission.title: Daily Mission
dailyMission.subtitle: Upload receipts to complete your daily mission

earn.ballotNumbersHint: Each ticket you earn adds one numbered ballot to the pool. On Sunday, the draw picks random ballots — if your number is announced below, you won.
earn.ballotNumbersEmpty: Earn tickets (ads, receipts, etc.) to get ballot numbers here.

shake.title: Lucky Shake
shake.subtitle: Shake your phone to win bonus tickets!
shake.ready: 🎯 Your shake is ready — good luck!
shake.lockedHint: Next shake unlocks at midnight Jakarta time

toast.waitCountdown: Come back after midnight Jakarta time for your next shake!
toast.alreadyUsed: Already used today's shake. Come back tomorrow!
toast.unlockOnZero: Your shake unlocks at midnight Jakarta time!
toast.unsupportedDevice: Device not supported. Try on mobile.
toast.sensorPermission: Sensor permission required for Lucky Shake.

weeklyDraw.title: Weekly Draw
weeklyDraw.subtitle: Weekly lottery draw every Sunday at 21:00 WIB
weeklyDraw.winningBallotsHint: If one of these matches your numbers from Earn, you won (we also notify winners).
weeklyDraw.winningBallotsEmpty: Ballot numbers will appear here after the next draw runs.

weeklyReward.headline: Win a Rp100,000 Shopping Voucher
weeklyReward.rule: Each 10 tickets = 1 entry in the weekly draw
weeklyReward.nextEntryFooter: Earn {{needed}} more ticket(s) to unlock 1 more entry

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top receipt hunters this week
leaderboard.noWinnersYet: No draw winners yet — first draw coming soon!

invite.title: Invite
invite.subtitle: Invite your friends to StrukCuan and earn tickets together.
invite.inviteDesc:
Invite your friends to StrukCuan.
You get +5 tickets, your friend gets +2 bonus tickets when they upload their first receipt.
invite.friendsJoinedDesc: Friends who registered & uploaded their first receipt
invite.infoCard: Share the invite link with friends and start making your next grocery run pay. Every friend who registers and uploads their first receipt earns you +5 tickets and them +2 bonus tickets. Everyone wins!
invite.step1: Share your referral code with friends
invite.step2: Friend signs up and uploads their first receipt
invite.step3: Both of you earn bonus tickets!
invite.shareMessage: Join StrukCuan and earn rewards by scanning your grocery receipts! Use my code: {{code}}

receiptHistory.title: Receipt History
receiptHistory.subtitle: View the verification status of all your uploaded receipts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.redAlertDesc: Red Promo alerts within 3-5km radius are sent via Push Notification (not SMS/WhatsApp) — free for you!
settings.cuanDashboardDesc: Ticket jar, stats & Hall of Fame
settings.deleteAccountDesc: All your data will be permanently deleted
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. All your receipts, tickets and reward history will be deleted.
settings.deleteFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again.

toast.dealActionFailed: Could not update deal. In Supabase: set user_stats.is_admin = true for your user, or add App metadata {"is_admin":true}, and run admin_receipts_deals_fix.sql (includes get_is_admin).
toast.receiptActionFailed: Could not update receipt. Run DB migration admin_receipts_deals_fix.sql if this persists.
